questions.question: Rewrite in the passive: “They clean the rooms every day.” The rooms {a1}.
Rewrite naturally in active voice: “The letter was written by Anna.” Anna {a1}.
Choose the passive subject from the object: Someone broke the window. {a1}.
Keep the important agent: Shakespeare wrote the play. The play {a1}.
Preserve the tense: They are repairing the road. The road {a1}.
Choose the present simple passive: English {a1}.
Choose the past simple passive: The bridge {a1}.
Choose the present perfect passive: The report {a1}.
Choose the future passive: The tickets {a1}.
Omit the unimportant agent: Someone has closed the shop. The shop {a1}.
Correct the passive form: The report {a1}.
Choose the modal passive: This form {a1}.
